talks.title: Coding Dojo - Determine CI context
talks.description: Coding Dojos are a great way to practice and enhance your skills in Test-Driven Development (TDD), software craftsmanship, and incremental software design. Detect whether your program runs on Jenkins or locally and determine the CI context based on the environment variables.

talks.title: YANGA
talks.description: Designing a build environment for engineering software product lines.

talks.title: 🛠 Working Experience
talks.description: Here are some highlights on the projects/applications I have been working over the years.

demos.title: 💡 SPL Mindmap
demos.description: Mindmap as basis for discussing about Software Product Line Engineering.

demos.title: 🔎 Objects Dependencies Graph
demos.description: I have generated a dependency graph of the objects in my Matter Smart Temperature Sensor project. It is surprising how many objects are created and how they are connected to each other, for just a simple temperature and humidity monitoring application.

demos.title: SPLED Yanga Reports
demos.description: Example of generated reports for an embedded software product line with multiple variants using YANGA.
